title: Generic type annotations should not use TypeVars
description: Avoid using TypeVars in generic type annotations as they can lead to unintended type instability.
message: Avoid using TypeVars in generic type annotations.

noncompliant.code:
from typing import TypeVar, List

T = TypeVar('T')
MyList = List[T]
noncompliant.description: Using TypeVar in generic type annotation

compliant.code:
from typing import List, Type

T = Type[Any]
MyList = List[T]

why_is_this_an_issue: TypeVars can change the concrete types at runtime, causing potential instability and runtime errors.
how_to_fix: Replace TypeVars with Types or specific type definitions.

metadata.title: Generic type annotations should not use TypeVars
